name: M-Aminophenol
description: M-aminophenol is a synthetic dye (ColorIndex CI 76545) used in hair dyes. It is produced from coal tar.Hair dyes are the subject of several studies that try to demonstrate their allergenic and toxic potential for men.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Magnesium Carbonate
description: Magnesium carbonate is in the form of an odorless white powder. It can be used in cosmetics in the form of a white dye, in this case it is indicated as CI 77713. As an active ingredient, it is used as a binder or absorbent. It also allows you to adjust the PH of the products.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Magnesium Chloride
description: Magnesium chloride is a mineral essential to our metabolism, from both a nervous and cellular point of view. It can be taken as a course of treatment to help combat stress and reduce signs of anxiety and fatigue: it is listed as a food additive under the name E511. It is used in cosmetics for its antibacterial properties.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Magnesium Laureth Sulfate
description: Magnesium laureth sulfate is the salt of SLES (Sodium Laureth Sulfate). It is used in bath products and shampoos because of its softness. It is less irritating than most sulphated surfactants, and can therefore be used by people with more sensitive skin.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Magnesium Stearate
description: Magnesium stearate is a texture and consistency agent widely used in make-up products. It improves make-up adhesion and hold. It is also used as a food additive under the names E572 or E470b, for its anti-caking, emulsifying and thickening functions.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Maltodextrin
description: Maltodextrin is a sugar obtained by the hydrolysis of corn starch, rice starch or potato starch. It is most often used in food, to provide carbohydrate supplements to food. It is found in energy drinks dedicated athletes. In cosmetics, it is used as a stabilizer for the formula or as a film-forming agent. In 2002, a patent filed by Unilever, reveals that Maltodextrin enhances the anti-aging activity of weak acids and reduces skin irritation sometimes caused by other acids.Maltodextrin is allowed in Bio.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Magnesium Sulfate
description: Also known as Epsom salt, magnesium sulfate is a mineral used in cosmetics as a stabilizer to soothe, exfoliate and revitalize the skin. Magnesium sulfate is also used in many other areas: in bath water to promote muscle relaxation, as a laxative for occasional constipation, and as a mineral fertilizer in agriculture to meet the magnesium and sulfur needs of plants.

name: Mel
description: Honey is a viscous liquid derived from the nectar of flowers and produced by bees. It is a natural sweetener that contains a mixture of glucose, fructose, sucrose and other natural sugars. As part of cosmetics, honey is used as a skin moisturizer, humectant, antibacterial and flavoring. Honey is attributed to many properties such as treating acne, having antioxidant properties or even being a hair conditioner.On the side of the antibacterial properties, it is the Manuka honey that must be favored: it is produced from the bushes of the same name in New Zealand. It contains a "Super" antibacterial called Methylglyoxal or MGO, ideal in a facial mask.Honey is allowed in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Animal.

name: Menthol
description: Menthol is a member of the alcohol family and is obtained from mint or peppermint oils. It has a peppermint scent. It is known for its invigorating and refreshing effects on the skin. However, it is highly sensitizing and can cause irritation and even allergic reactions. It is one of the allergens regulated by Europe. It is authorized for organic products.

name: Methoxypropylamino Cyclohexenylidene Ethoxyethylcyanoacetate
description: Methoxypropylamino cyclohexenylidene ethoxyethylcyanoacetate is a chemical UV filter approved for use in sunscreens in Europe. It absorbs UVA rays (360-400 nm). Due to its production method, it is associated with an orange flower on our app. It is prohibited in spray products.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Methyl Gluceth-20
description: Gluceth-20 methyl is produced from glucose, methyl alcohol and sugar derivatives. It is used in cosmetics as emollient (softens skin), moisturizing (retains water) and moisturizer. It is used mainly in moisturizing and nourishing care for dry and irritated skin. The ingredient does not pose any concern for human health, its impact on nature is more worrying (chemical transformation and low biodegradability).
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Methyl Salicylate
description: Methyl salicylate is a volatile organic compound used in cosmetics due to its strong odor. Methyl salicylate is banned in Europe in preparations intended for children under 6 years of age, with the exception of toothpaste. It is one of the allergens regulated in Europe.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Natural.

name: Methylene Di-T-Butylcresol
description: To avoid - Toxic for reproduction according to ECHA (European Chemicals Agency). This molecule has been added to the list of SVHC substances in Europe.

name: Methylene Glycol

note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах.

name: Methylparaben
description: Methylparaben is one of the short-chain parabens. It is used as a preservative (antifungal) in cosmetics. Although long-chain parabens are reputed to be the most dangerous, in 2025 Methylparaben is the subject of a request (from France) for specific classification as an endocrine disruptor at European level (CLH).In keeping with the precautionary principle, and the many controversies surrounding it, Methylparaben is associated with a red flower on our application.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Methylpropanediol
description: Methylpropanediol (MPD) is a synthetic ingredient used in cosmetics as a solvent, i.e. for its ability to dissolve various substances. It also has moisturizing properties and can be used to enhance the efficacy of certain preservatives.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Methylisothiazolinone
description: Methylisothiazolinone, better known by the acronym MIT, is used as a synthetic preservative in cosmetics. It has been used as a substitute for parabens in so-called "paraben free" products by a number of brands. But, it turns out that the molecule is extremely allergenic, it's nerd! The American Contact Dermatitis Society even designated it in 2013 as the "ALLERGEN OF THE YEAR"!Due to many cases, European legislation has recently adapted:The ingredient has been completely banned in rinsed products since February 2017 and since April 2018, the maximum permitted levels of MIT in rinsed products have been largely revised downward (see below).MIT is mostly used with CMIT (Methylchloroisothiazolinone).
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Methyl Pyrrolidone
description: Methyl Pyrrolidone — косметический ингредиент.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Methylene Bis-Benzotriazolyl Tetramethylbutylphenol
description: Methylene Bis-Benzotriazolyl Tetramethylbutylphenol is a chemical filter with a broad UV spectrum (290 to 400 nm), insoluble in water and oil. It is displayed with an orange flower on our application because of the way it is produced.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Methylchloroisothiazolinone
description: Methylchloroisothiazolinone, better known by the acronym CMIT, is a preservative used in cosmetics and household products together with Methylisothiazolinone (MIT).CMIT can not be used alone, but only with MIT. In fact, since MIT is prohibited in rinsed products, so is CMIT.

description: Microcrystalline cellulose is a purified form of cellulose. It is used in cosmetics for its soft texture and ability to add volume without weighing down formulations. It is listed as a food ingredient under the name E430, and acts as a texturizing agent, bringing roundness to the palate.

name: Montmorillonite
description: Montmorillonite is a green clay composed of aluminum silicate and magnesium hydrate. It takes its name from the village of Montmorillon (Vienne, France), in which it was discovered in 1847: today this deposit is exhausted, it is found in the south of France or in the United States. In cosmetics, this clay is used for its absorbing, healing and mineralizing virtues. Montmorillonite is allowed in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Mineral.

description: Myristic alcohol or Tetradecanol is a fatty alcohol used in cosmetics as an emollient (helps water and oil to mix). It is derived from coconut oil, palm kernel oil, or even nutmeg. Myristic alcohol is permitted in organic/bio products.The CIR (Cosmetic Ingredient Review) in an annual report published in 2008, concluded the safety of fatty alcohols.
